## Checklist

- [ ] Branched from `main` and kept the change focused
- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes (coverage thresholds met)
- [ ] `npm run eval` passes
- [ ] `npm run snapshot` passes (or N/A, explained above)
- [ ] `npm audit` shows no new advisories
- [ ] Tests added or updated for the change
- [ ] Docs updated (README / CONTRIBUTING) if behavior changed
